_meta.purpose: OHLCV relationship families for the golden-calibration search policy (docs/GOLDEN_CALIBRATION_FEATURE_SEARCH.md §3-4). Groups the 45 searchable optional/opt-in ids by mathematical meaning; the search evaluates candidates per family, picks the simplest one-SE plateau representative, and orders the greedy pool by family. Part of the recipe identity: editing this map = a new search epoch.
_meta.scope: searchable non-1h ids only (the 1h core 1-17 is frozen and never searched)
